text: Lesson 129
Seventy miles an hour
Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音,然后回答这个问题。

text: What does Ann advise her husband to do next time?
zh: 安建议她丈夫下次该怎么做?

text: Look, Gary!
That policeman's waving to you.
He wants you to stop.
Where do you think you are?
On a race track?
You must have been driving at seventy miles an hour.
zh: 你刚才一定是以每小时七十英里的速度行驶的。

text: I can't have been.
I was doing eighty when I overtook you.
zh: 我超过你的时候是每小时八十英里。

text: Didn't you see the speed limit?
I'm afraid I didn't, officer.
I must have been dreaming.
He wasn't dreaming, officer.
I was telling him to drive slowly.
That's why I didn't see the sign.
zh: 这就是我没看到那个标志的原因。

text: Let me see your driving licence.
I won't charge you this time.
But you'd better not do it again!
Thank you.
I'll certainly be more careful.
I told you to drive slowly, Gary.
zh: 我告诉过你要开慢点,加里。

text: You always tell me to drive slowly, darling.
zh: 你总是叫我开慢点,亲爱的。

text: Well, next time you'd better take my advice!
zh: 好吧,下次你最好听我的劝告!
